issue.message: `android:windowSplashScreenBackground` requires API level 31 (current min is 26)
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_collapsed_mine_desc">A vast cavern beneath the copper mines. Cave trolls and rock golems haunt the rubble, and giant spiders spin webs across the collapsed shafts.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_shadow_den_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_shadow_den_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_shadow_den_desc">A network of underground chambers used by the region\'s thieves guild. Rogues, assassins, and shadow creatures lurk in every corner.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_abyssal_ruins_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_abyssal_ruins_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_abyssal_ruins_desc">Ancient ruins that exist simultaneously above and below the mortal plane. Strange abyssal creatures phase in and out of reality.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_ancient_forest_ruins_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_ancient_forest_ruins_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_ancient_forest_ruins_desc">Stone ruins swallowed by the primeval forest, now haunted by feral creatures and vengeful spirits of druids.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_ancient_forge_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_ancient_forge_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_ancient_forge_desc">A vast dwarven forge that has burned for centuries without stopping. Fire elementals and forge guardians protect its secrets.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_arcane_ruins_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_arcane_ruins_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_arcane_ruins_desc">The functional underground chambers of a destroyed wizard\'s tower. Magical constructs and enchanted guardians still patrol its halls.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_corrupted_sanctum_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_corrupted_sanctum_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_corrupted_sanctum_desc">A shadow-drenched sanctum at the heart of the corrupted canopy. Dark priests and corrupted beasts guard an ancient evil.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dungeon_drowned_temple_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.dungeon_drowned_temple_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dungeon_drowned_temple_desc">A sunken temple beneath the sea grotto, its halls filled with water and sea creatures that have made it their home.</string>
